text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And now, to grill this cabbage whole! ♪ Let's make some buono food! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is one healthy barbecue if I ever saw
one!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: And it's got big ol' crunch and bite! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Now I'll grill a whole king salmon and lobster! ♪
Look at these buono beauties of the sea!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it looks so fresh!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: It's totes plump and moist, y'all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And for the big finale! We all love a nice, juicy
hunk of meat! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It's drippin' with juice!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Howdy! Juicy! ♪ It's howdy to the juicy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Pearl, I know you're trying to sound like an
American...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But don't you think you're comin' off a little
cringe?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Also, Akebono... why's everything supersized?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! Once you notice one thing, you start
noticing 'em all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm right there with you, Hishiama. But once
you've stuck your nose in... you're already stuck!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm divin' straight iiiin!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, El's right. We should make hay while the
sun shines. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Everything's hot and ready to go! Don't be shy,
dig in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you have a point. It'd be a waste not to eat
all this meat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That does it! I'm gonna enjoy myself and not
sweat the small stuff! Come on, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm right there with you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However... we shouldn't indulge to the point
where it negatively impacts our performance. ♪
